name: VoidInformation
description: Information about a void applied to a check or item.

voidUser.description: The user who voided the order.

voidApprover.description: The user who approved the void.

voidDate.description: The date on which the void was made.

voidBusinessDate.description: The business date (yyyyMMdd) on which the void was made. Response only.

voidReason.description: A reference to the configured void reason for the void.
